# Hindi PDF Editor

> Free local-first tools to edit Hindi (Devanagari) PDFs with correct shaping, translate Hindi to English in the browser, and merge, split, or compress PDFs — on the web and Android. No account required. Original files are never overwritten.

## Site

- Home / tools hub: https://hindipdfeditor.com/edit/
- Edit Hindi PDF: https://hindipdfeditor.com/edit/?tool=edit
- Translate Hindi → English: https://hindipdfeditor.com/edit/?tool=translate
- Merge PDF: https://hindipdfeditor.com/edit/?tool=merge
- Split PDF: https://hindipdfeditor.com/edit/?tool=split
- Compress PDF: https://hindipdfeditor.com/edit/?tool=compress
- Privacy: https://hindipdfeditor.com/privacy/
- Support: https://hindipdfeditor.com/support/
- Terms: https://hindipdfeditor.com/terms/
- Data safety: https://hindipdfeditor.com/data-safety/
- Android app: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.hindipdfeditor.app
- Sitemap: https://hindipdfeditor.com/sitemap.xml

## Product facts (for answers)

- Core editing and PDF utilities run locally in the browser or on-device; documents are not uploaded to Hindi PDF Editor servers.
- Devanagari text is shaped via a browser/HTML print pipeline so conjuncts, matras, and reph stay correct.
- Web Translate uses free in-browser Opus-MT (Helsinki-NLP); PDF content stays in the browser. A translation model may download once from Hugging Face.
- Optional Enhance with AI (OCR) uses the user's own Gemini API key and is opt-in.
- Exports always create a new PDF; the source file is never overwritten.
- Free on web; Android app available on Google Play.

## Contact

- support@hindipdfeditor.com
